API Platform

Build on top of Cinturon360

Cinturon360 is being designed as more than a user interface. It is being built as a travel governance and visibility platform that TMCs and partners can connect into their own operating model.

API capability areas

The Cinturon360 API is being planned to support the full lifecycle of travel program management, giving TMCs and technology partners the integration flexibility they need.

🏢

Client & Account Provisioning

Create and manage client accounts, organisational structures, and entity configurations programmatically.

👤

Traveller & Approver Management

Manage user profiles, roles, approval chains, and traveller data through structured API endpoints.

⚖️

Policy & Approval Workflows

Configure policy rules and approval paths, and trigger or process approval workflows via API.

✈️

Booking & Travel Data Exchange

Submit booking data from any channel and receive structured governance outputs in return.

📊

Reporting & Data Extraction

Pull spend, compliance, exception, and operational data into your own reporting and BI tools.

🔔

Webhooks & Event-Driven Workflows

Receive real-time events for approvals, policy outcomes, bookings, and audit activity.

Pre-release

API documentation coming soon

The Cinturon360 API is currently in design and development. If you are a TMC, technology partner, or developer interested in integration discussions, get in touch.

Discuss Integration Join Waitlist

Ready to replace legacy with modern?

Cinturon360 is in active development. TMCs and design partners are joining now to shape the platform. Get early access and be first to go live.
